channel.title: New Installation on Colin Bousige
channel.description: Recent content in New Installation on Colin Bousige

item.title: Setting up your new Mac for academic work
item.description: This is mainly for my own use, but I figured it might be useful to put it on-line… When changing computer, it’s always a pain in the ass to set up your new machine like the old one. Over time, I tried to gather the different commands for installing the various programs I use to ease the setup of my next computer (or the update of my current one). You’ll find the following entries on my github page, as well as my .
